Pittsburgh EB to Irwin - I-76 East to close, from Sunday, April 12 at 12:00 am through 5:00 am. Take US 22 East (10.3 miles) to PA Toll 66 South (7 miles) to US 30 West (4.6 miles). This will bring you to the Irwin Interchange (67). Re-enter PA Turnpike at Irwin Interchange (67)
Detour Information
Take US 22 East (10.3 miles) to PA Toll 66 South (7 miles) to US 30 West (4.6 miles). This will bring you to the Irwin Interchange (67). Re-enter PA Turnpike at Irwin Interchange (67)

Downingtown WB to Morgantown All Traffic Primary - I-76 West to close, from Sunday, April 12 at 12:00 am through 5:00 am. Take State Route 100 North (9 miles) to State Route 23 West (12.5 miles) to State Route 10 North (1 mile). Re-enter the Pennsylvania Turnpike at the Morgantown Interchange (298)
Detour Information
Take State Route 100 North (9 miles) to State Route 23 West (12.5 miles) to State Route 10 North (1 mile). Re-enter the Pennsylvania Turnpike at the Morgantown Interchange (298)

Quakertown NB to Lehigh Valley All Traffic Primary Rt - I-476 North to close, from Sunday, April 12 at 12:00 am through 5:00 am. Take PA 663 North to PA 309 North, I-78 West to PA 309 North, follow to US 22 West or Tilghman Street West. This will bring you to the Lehigh Valley Interchange (56)
Detour Information
Take PA 663 North to PA 309 North, I-78 West to PA 309 North, follow to US 22 West or Tilghman Street West. This will bring you to the Lehigh Valley Interchange (56)
